steps.title: Identify the relationship (Pythagoras / SOH-CAH-TOA)
steps.content:
The right angle is at $C$. From angle $A$, the opposite side is $BC = 35$ and the hypotenuse is $BA = 171$. Apply SOH:
$$\sin A = \frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$$

steps.title: Solve for the missing side
steps.content:
Substitute:
$$\sin A = \frac{35}{171}$$
That matches choice B — B is correct.
